scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves Azure what-if, permission, validation-level, policy-denial, deployment-scope, and missing-authorization escalation handling.

scenario_results.evidence: Scenario proves cost, reliability, isolation, state/workspace, quota, blast-radius, and approval-boundary tradeoff handling.

notes: All 18 refreshed scenarios passed against the standard validation profile.

Scenario coverage includes core IaC guidance, operations troubleshooting, state and drift recovery, provider-native preview workflows, cost/reliability/isolation tradeoffs, output fidelity, boundary refusal, low-confidence escalation, conflicting-policy handling, tenant adaptation, and commercialization readiness.
No unreviewed regressions were recorded; the previous built-era package is superseded as baseline context by this spec-first package.
